activeGoal: 排查并修复：最新修复后，测试页面中 sidepanel 仍未显示“授权当前域名”入口，且进入测试页面后右侧没有插件图标/无法按预期打开扩展侧边栏。需要基于当前仓库实现确认是真实功能缺陷、配置/加载步骤问题还是文档与实际不符，并在必要时做最小

tasks.summary: Completed fast-track issue fix for extension permission-entry visibility and outdated extension build guidance. Added fallback authorization guidance in sidepanel even when current build cannot request permission for the domain, updated README with env/build/reload checks for 127.0.0.1 manifest permissions and missing AI button troubleshooting, and added extension test coverage.
